## New UI

- **Redesigned the desktop app around the new Dictator visual direction.** The main dictation surface now uses the updated header, status pill, layered mic control, transcript card, history styling, and drawer-style settings.
- **Refreshed the phone companion UI.** The mobile mic screen, connection state, action buttons, and live-mode controls now match the desktop design language.
- **Moved phone and GPU details into a collapsed utility footer.** The main screen stays focused on dictation, while companion URLs and the Free GPU action remain one click away.
- **Improved brand/logo contrast.** The hat logo now sits on a light badge so it remains visible instead of disappearing into the black mark.
